blocks.text: Glimt rock San Siro — Norway's greatest night in European football
Bodø/Glimt's 2-1 away win at Inter on Tuesday is one of Norwegian football's finest European results. Wednesday added more drama: Atalanta crushed Dortmund 4-1, Real Madrid edged Benfica 2-1.
⛷️ 16:05 — Biathlon WC Women's 15km Individual, Kontiolahti — Røiseland, Tandrevold and Kirkeeide on course
